components.html:
Data Insights & Intelligence

Capturamos sinais onde outros veem silencio.

narrative.overview: This interface feels like a strategic control room, not a startup dashboard and not a decorative agency portfolio. Darkness carries authority and focus, while restrained cyan accents identify action, emphasis, and analytical confidence. The visual system prioritizes interpretation over spectacle.
keyCharacteristics: Deliberate dark surfaces with warm, readable neutrals
Accent color used as signal, not decoration
Editorial serif hierarchy paired with operational sans + mono labels
Border-led depth and tonal layering instead of heavy shadow styling

rules.name: The One Signal Rule
rules.body: Accent cyan is the only saturated control color on primary surfaces.

rules.name: The Two Voices Rule
rules.body: Fraunces speaks direction and meaning. Inter/Mono speak operation and structure.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces start flat. Lift appears only when state changes justify it.

dos: Do preserve the signal over noise balance.
Do keep accent usage intentional and scarce.
donts: Don't build generic SaaS landing pages with hero-metric dashboards and purple gradients.
Don't replicate cookie-cutter agency sites with parallax hero images and "we're creative" copy.
Don't drift into consulting sites that feel like PowerPoint decks (McKinsey blue, stock photography grids).
Don't apply glassmorphism-heavy dark themes with neon accents (crypto/Web3 aesthetic).
